meta.title: Kadièbwe Makina Edvais | Information Systems Engineer
meta.description: Information systems engineer — design, development and digital infrastructure. Lubumbashi, Democratic Republic of the Congo.
meta.keywords: IS engineer, information systems, software development, Lubumbashi, Congo
meta.ogTitle: Kadièbwe Makina Edvais | Information Systems Engineer
meta.ogDescription: Information systems and digital services for organizations and businesses.

hero.description: I design, deploy and maintain reliable digital solutions. My practice spans development, networking and artificial intelligence, with a specialization in information systems (IS).

about.title: Presentation
about.subtitle: Information systems (IS) specialist
about.p1: Graduate of Université Protestante de Lubumbashi (UPL) in information systems, software engineering and artificial intelligence. I work across the solution lifecycle: analysis, design, implementation, deployment and maintenance.
about.p2: My approach is deliberately realistic: broad exposure to complementary technologies, with proven expertise in information systems and service quality.
about.lead: A structured technical background focused on reliability and service.

t1.text: Edvais transformed our IT infrastructure with remarkable expertise. His professionalism and problem-solving skills are exceptional.
t1.name: Jean Mukendi

t2.text: The AI surveillance system exceeded our expectations. An innovative, reliable solution perfectly tailored to our needs.
t2.name: Amina Kabongo

t3.text: Exceptional trainer and talented developer. Edvais combines technical expertise and pedagogy for concrete results.
t3.name: Patrick Lumumba
